summary: ANDROID 🟥 DFU flow can proceed on Software Update page even though device was disconnected
scenario: DFU flow incorrectly proceeds to Three Easy Steps page when device is disconnected during Software Update page
description_clean: DFU flow can proceed on the Software Update page even though the device was disconnected. After entering the DFU flow and navigating to the Software Update page, if the user disconnects the headset (or puts one earbud in the case) and taps Continue, the user is incorrectly navigated to the Three Easy Steps page instead of being shown an error message: "Update currently not available, please try back later."
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Ensure a Bluetooth audio device (e.g., headset or earbuds) is connected
Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Software Update
Tap Continue to enter the DFU (Device Firmware Update) flow
While on the Software Update page, disconnect the device (e.g., turn off Bluetooth, put one earbud in the case, or power off the headset)
expected: User should see an error message: "Update currently not available, please try back later."
actual: User is incorrectly navigated to the Three Easy Steps page instead of seeing the error message.
